title.value: WonderDrug 500 mg tablets — Summary of Product Characteristics

div.p: Each tablet contains 500 mg of paracetamol as the active substance.
Clinical particulars for WonderDrug 500 mg tablets.
WonderDrug is indicated in adults for the conditions listed below.
For the symptomatic treatment of fever.

title.value: 4.1.2 Treatment of mild to moderate pain

div.p: For the treatment of mild to moderate pain.
The recommended dose is one 500 mg tablet every 4 to 6 hours, to a maximum of 4 g per day in adults.
Do not take WonderDrug in acute hepatic failure.

title.value: 4.4 Special warnings and precautions for use

p.span: Do not exceed the stated dose. Overdose may cause severe liver damage.

title.value: 4.5 Interaction with other medicinal products and other forms of interaction

div.p: Concomitant use with warfarin may enhance the anticoagulant effect.
WonderDrug can be used during pregnancy if clinically needed, at the lowest effective dose for the shortest possible time.

title.value: 4.7 Effects on ability to drive and use machines

div.p: WonderDrug has no or negligible influence on the ability to drive and use machines.
In case of overdose, seek immediate medical attention. Treatment with N-acetylcysteine may be required.
Pharmacotherapeutic group: Other analgesics and antipyretics, anilides.
PVC/aluminium blister in a carton of 20 tablets.
The product header artwork is included as a contained SVG image.

description.value: Do not exceed the stated dose. Overdose may cause severe, potentially fatal liver damage.

text.value: One 500 mg tablet every 4 to 6 hours as required; maximum 4 g (8 tablets) per day.
